## GYEON LeatherWipe: LIGHT COLORED LEATHER TOWEL

### SOFT AND EFFECTIVE EDGELESS LEATHER CLEANING TOWEL

The low pile, edgeless Q²M LeatherWipe EVO is gentle yet absorbant. Perfect to remove dirt and cleaner residue on any type of leather upholstery. It is also very effective on alcantara. Ultrasonic cut provides a precise and safe edgeless finish.

SIZES: 40X40 CM

PCS: 2 PACK
